# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
# Frontend Service Deployment with Linkerd proxy injection
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: "3306"
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: frontend:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Backend API Service Deployment with Linkerd proxy injection
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "150m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "1"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "512Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306,6379"
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: backend-api:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
            - containerPort: 4191
              name: metrics
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "database.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: CACHE_HOST
              value: "cache.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8443
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-api
  ports:
    - name: https
      port: 443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Orders Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "info"
      labels:
        app: orders-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: orders-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: orders-service
          image: orders-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: orders-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: orders-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Payments Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "150m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "info"
      labels:
        app: payments-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payments-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: payments-service
          image: payments-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "150m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "750m"
              memory: "768Mi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payments-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payments-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Server Policy: Define the backend-api server for HTTP traffic
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: https
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server Policy: Define the backend-api gRPC server
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server Policy: Define the orders-service server
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server Policy: Define the payments-service server
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server Policy: Define the frontend server
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow frontend to access backend-api via HTTPS
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-api-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow frontend to access backend-api via gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-api-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow backend-api to access orders-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-api-to-orders-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow backend-api to access payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-api-to-payments-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow orders-service to access payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-to-payments-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders-service-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow ingress (unauthenticated) traffic to frontend
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: ingress-to-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true

---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Fine-grained HTTP route authorization for backend-api
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-route-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-api-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: backend-api-mesh-tls-auth
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication: Define which identities can access backend-api
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-api-mesh-tls-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "frontend-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Fine-grained authorization for orders-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: orders-service-route-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: orders-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: orders-service-mesh-tls-auth
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication: Define which identities can access orders-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: orders-service-mesh-tls-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "backend-api-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Fine-grained authorization for payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payments-service-route-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payments-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payments-service-mesh-tls-auth
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# MeshTLSAuthentication: Define which identities can access payments-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payments-service-mesh-tls-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "backend-api-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "orders-service-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# HTTPRoute: Define specific route rules for backend-api
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-api-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: backend-api-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/orders
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/orders
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET

---
# NetworkAuthentication: Restrict traffic from specific CIDR ranges
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: internal-network-auth
  namespace:
